_about: Reviewable mirror of the sample-scenario Cases seeded by scripts/apex/seed_sample_data.apex. S8 is seeded directly and escalated via the renewal-risk flow. The S6 provisioning-exception Case is NOT seeded directly — it is raised by ProvisioningCompletedSubscriber when the seed publishes a Failure Provisioning_Completed__e for the S6 order. The Apex script is the runtime source of truth — keep in sync.

records.Subject: [S8] Hooli renewal at risk
records.expected: Update to High fires Case_After_Save_Renewal_Risk_Escalation — escalation tasks + routed to the Renewal Risk queue + Escalated_To_Renewal_Queue__c = true.

records.Subject: Provisioning did not complete for order ... (raised by automation)
records.note: Created by ProvisioningCompletedSubscriber from the Failure Provisioning_Completed__e the seed publishes — not seeded directly. Carries Provisioning_Failure_Reason__c and is owned by the Provisioning Exceptions queue.
